MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-21-2009 IN 206, DEFENDANT MICHAEL BURTON'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 4/27/09 IS CONTINUED TO 5/11/09 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:00 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OF 4/23/09 WILL BE CONTINUED TO 5/7/09 IN DEPT. 218 AT 1:30PM. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: SCOTT HUGHES, CSR# 12365 (206)
